title: Segmentation fault while query execution
description:
After running the following queries, virtuoso (opensource, built from brew on OS X 10.9, DBpedia 2014 uploaded and bif fulltext index on object column) ends up in segmentation fault.  Please help, since it is relevant to a publication.
        Tue Nov 18 2014
09:18:52 { Loading plugin 1: Type `plain', file `wikiv' in `/usr/local/Cellar/virtuoso/HEAD/lib/virtuoso/hosting'
09:18:52   FAILED  plugin 1: Unable to locate file }

}

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_projects (proj_uri String, p_uri String, o_uri String, abstract String, const_uri String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY proj_uri;

INSERT INTO test_projects (proj_uri, p_uri, o_uri, abstract, const_uri) VALUES ('http://dbpedia.org/resource/University_of_South_Africa', 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/abstract', 'Some abstract text', 'anti-apartheid activist', 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/almaMater');

SELECT DISTINCT proj_uri FROM test_projects WHERE proj_uri IN (SELECT proj_uri FROM test_projects WHERE const_uri = 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/almaMater') AND abstract LIKE '%anti-apartheid activist%';
ALTER TABLE test_projects UPDATE abstract = NULL WHERE proj_uri = 'http://dbpedia.org/resource/University_of_South_Africa';
ALTER TABLE test_projects DELETE WHERE proj_uri = 'http://dbpedia.org/resource/University_of_South_Africa';
key_bug_features: Segmentation fault during execution of complex SPARQL queries
